---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new clinical safety skill or learning guide
title: "[SKILL REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## New Skill Request

### What skill are you requesting?

A short name and one-line description (e.g., "PSIRF incident review — guide for reviewing
patient safety incidents under the Patient Safety Incident Response Framework").

### Who would use it?

- [ ] Student nurses
- [ ] Newly qualified nurses
- [ ] Digital Clinical Safety Officers (DCSOs)
- [ ] Nurse educators
- [ ] Health IT developers
- [ ] NHS organisations (deployers)
- [ ] Other: ___________

### What clinical problem does it solve?

What situation would a nurse or DCSO be in when they reach for this skill?
(Be specific — describe the moment of need)

### What standards or guidance would it be based on?

Please cite the authoritative source(s):

- [ ] DCB0129 / DCB0160
- [ ] NMC Standards of Proficiency (2018)
- [ ] NICE guideline (specify)
- [ ] NHS England guidance (specify)
- [ ] MHRA guidance
- [ ] Royal College guideline (specify)
- [ ] Other: ___________

### Is there anything similar already in this repo?

Check the existing skills first. If there's an overlap, explain how this would be different or complementary.

### Would you be willing to help write it?

- [ ] Yes — I can draft the content
- [ ] Yes — I can review a draft for clinical accuracy
- [ ] No — I'm suggesting it for someone else to pick up

### Any other context?

---

*Skills are prioritised based on clinical need and educational value for the UK nursing community.*
